description: A treemap of car data using nesting by Origin and Cylinders, sized by Horsepower.

tooltip.signal:
{"Name": isValid(datum["Name"]) ? isArray(datum["Name"]) ? join(datum["Name"], '
') : datum["Name"] : ""+datum["Name"], "Origin": isValid(datum["Origin"]) ? isArray(datum["Origin"]) ? join(datum["Origin"], '
') : datum["Origin"] : ""+datum["Origin"], "Cylinders": isValid(datum["Cylinders"]) ? isArray(datum["Cylinders"]) ? join(datum["Cylinders"], '
') : datum["Cylinders"] : ""+datum["Cylinders"], "Horsepower": format(datum["Horsepower"], "")}

description.signal: "Origin: " + (isValid(datum["Origin"]) ? isArray(datum["Origin"]) ? join(datum["Origin"], ' ') : datum["Origin"] : ""+datum["Origin"]) + "; Horsepower: " + (format(datum["Horsepower"], "")) + "; Name: " + (isValid(datum["Name"]) ? isArray(datum["Name"]) ? join(datum["Name"], ' ') : datum["Name"] : ""+datum["Name"]) + "; Cylinders: " + (isValid(datum["Cylinders"]) ? isArray(datum["Cylinders"]) ? join(datum["Cylinders"], ' ') : datum["Cylinders"] : ""+datum["Cylinders"])
